case_title: AT&T ADVERTISING, L.P. VS. PATRICIA CRAMER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-24-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-08-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF AT&T ADVERTISING, L.P.'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO WRITTEN INTERROGATORIES AND SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. DEFENDANT SHALL RESPOND TO THE INTERROGATORIES AND PAY $590.00 IN SANCTIONS BY JANUARY 31, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; NOT REPORTED
